arts.ttl: Match Preview: BVB Travel to Lissabon for the First Champions League Play-off Leg
arts.sum: If I’m being totally honest, I don’t think BVB will stop Gyökeres from scoring. Unfortunately, BVB didn’t manage to advance directly to the knockout phase, which means that they now have to enter a two-legged play-off against Sporting CP.

arts.ttl: Coach 'not surprised' that Man Utd will sign €60m Sporting CP star
arts.sum: Coach 'not surprised' that Man Utd will sign €60m Sporting CP star In anticipation of this supposedly inevitable transfer, A Bola has spoken to Bernardo Bruschy, one of Quenda's former youth coaches, and he insists that it would not be a surprise to see the precocious youngster playing for one of the world's biggest clubs.

arts.ttl: Ramy Bensebaini out of BVB's trip to Lisbon
arts.sum: The Algerian full-back has been left behind in Dortmund as a precaution having felt a tweak in his muscle.

arts.ttl: Sky Germany: BVB given slim 5.1% chance of Champions League qualification for 2025-26
arts.sum: As fears grow for one of Germany's biggest clubs missing out on Champions League action. Sky Germany relayed data produced by Opta who believe BVB have the odds stacked against them to finish inside the top four.
